statement: It should be impossible for event organizers to be able to make a request for a vaccination certificate upon entry.
The Netherlands must make its stay in the European Union (EU).
During the upcoming New Year's Eve, a ban should still be imposed on setting off decorative fireworks.
There should be less tax on making a purchase of meat.
The government should effect the keeping of the ban on face-covering clothing.
Instead of the national government, provinces and municipalities should make a decision where new housing developments are built.
The government should effect the keeping of the current VAT on cultural activities.
The Netherlands should effect the scrapping of nuclear power plants.
High school teachers should have earnings as much as elementary school teachers.
The Netherlands should effect the introduction of fewer flight taxes for short-haul flights.
Asylum seekers with a temporary residence permit should be granted permission to obtain rental housing before they are integrated.
Both purchase and sale of soft drugs by coffee shops should be given illegal authorization.
Increasing minimum wages should automatically have the effect of increasing welfare benefits.
New housing developments should have a proportion of up to 40 percent social housing.
The Netherlands should effect the acceptance of fewer refugees than it does now.
Expanding rights and freedoms is necessary to take up the fight against organized crime.
It should be harder for companies to effect the dismissal of workers.
The state should take measures to effect the increase of the gap between rich and poor.
The government must effect a decrease in spending on public health care, even if this means not to increase taxes.
The working day should be given an increase without increasing workers' salaries.
Governments should make as many interventions in the economy as possible.
Taxes on fossil fuels should be reduced to effect the financing of the Ecological Transition.

To better defend Spain's interests in Europe we must effect the cession of sovereignty.
The Spanish government should give a boost to the weakening of NATO in Europe.
The worst way to solve the conflict in Catalonia is to allow its citizens to cast a vote on their future in a referendum.
Negotiating with the independentistas effects a strengthening of the State.
The right to self-determination must be given non-recognition by the Constitution.
The policies of linguistic immersion in the own language of the bilingual Autonomous Communities have a beneficial effect on Spanish.
It is necessary to effect the pass of the Law of Democratic Memory during this legislature.
Immigrants should have access to free health services.
Permission should be given for unlimited speed on all highways.
Germany is to effect a reduction in its defense spending.
Only adults (18 and over) should be granted permission to vote in federal elections.
The ability of landlords to increase housing rents is to be given no restrictions by law.
All workers are to be given optional insurance in the statutory pension scheme.
Other cohabiting couples are to be given a stronger boost than the traditional family of father, mother and children.
Donations from companies to political parties should continue to be given prohibition.
The Nord Stream 2 Baltic Sea pipeline, which transports gas from Russia to Germany, should not be given permission to go into operation as planned.
Female civil servants should generally be placed under a ban on wearing headscarves on duty.
The federal government should make provision for less financial support for projects to combat anti-Semitism.
Chinese companies are to be given permission to receive contracts for the expansion of the communications infrastructure in Germany.
The state should put an end to the collection of church tax for religious communities.
The controlled sale of cannabis should be given general disapproval.
Germany is to make its stay in the European Union.
The use of facial recognition software for video surveillance in public places should be placed under a ban.
Conventional agriculture should be given a stronger boost than organic farming.
Islamic associations should be given rejection by the state as religious communities.
The statutory minimum wage is to be given a reduction to at least 12 euros by 2022 at the latest.
Air traffic is to be given lower taxation.
Working from home should be given permission everywhere, regardless of the company, if possible.
Social transfers should be given a reduction so as not to increase the burden on the state budget in times of inflation.
The state should give funding for private visits to specialists regardless of the waiting time in a public facility.
The state should refrain from making provision for free nursery places for all children.
Schools should have less freedom to make a choice of the content covered in the curriculum.
The state should effect the construction of low-income rental housing for rent.
Taxes should be given a decrease for top earners.
All entrepreneurs should make payment of health premiums based on their income regardless of income.
Poland should effect the rejection of the migrant relocation solutions adopted by the European Union.
The share of defense spending in Poland's GDP should be given a further reduction.
The powers of local governments should be given a reduction at the expense of the central government.
Public media funding from the state budget should be given increased restrictions.
The powers of the secret services to track the activities of citizens on the Internet should be given increased restrictions.
The EU's rule of law mechanism makes protection against Hungary's sovereignty.

Hungary should make a decision to remain part of the EU without consulting the electorate.

Teachers' salaries should be given a sufficient increase.

Same-sex couples should be given permission to marry.
The state should take targeted measures to give a boost to preventing fathers and mothers from sharing equally in child-rearing.
The Hungarian government should give rejection to the ratification of the Istanbul Convention, which combats violence against women and domestic violence.
The conclusion of favourable gas supply contracts with Russia is an inappropriate way of making reductions in rents.
Make a reduction in the contribution of the wealthier to the public burden (abolition of the one-band tax).
A price freeze on some basic foodstuffs (e.g. chicken tails, milk) is ineffective in taking up the fight against inflation.
The current three-month unemployment benefit should be given a cut.

In larger cities, it is unnecessary to give restrictions to car traffic by various measures (P+R parking, building cycle paths, improving public transport).
European economic integration has slowed: member states should effect the ceding of autonomy.

Recreational use of marijuana/cannabis should be given prohibition.

It should be more difficult for businesses to effect the dismissal of employees.

Beach concessions to private individuals should be given continuous duration over time.

Drilling is irrelevant to make discoveries of more energy resources.
Italy should effect the continuation of the sending arms and war material to the Ukrainian government.
The federal government should effect a revocation of funding for health insurance premium subsidies.
As part of the reform of the BVG (occupational pension plan), pensions are to be given an increase (lowering the minimum conversion rate from 6.8% to 6%).
Paid parental leave should be given a reduction under today's 14 weeks of maternity leave and two weeks of paternity leave.
The federal government should make provision for less financial support for public housing construction.
Insured persons should make a lesser contribution to health care costs (e.g., decrease the minimum deductible).
The Federal Council's ability to restrict private and economic life in the event of a pandemic should be given expanded restrictions.
The federal government should be removed the authority to make a determination on the hospital offering (national hospital planning with regard to locations and range of services).
The federal government should effect the decreasing of the requirements for the high school.

Married couples be given combined taxation (couple taxation).
The differences between cantons with high and low financial capacity should be given a further increase through fiscal equalization.
Private households should be limited in making a choice of their electricity supplier (full regulation of the electricity market).

The construction of new nuclear power plants should be given denial again.
The state should give no consideration to a comprehensive public service offering also in rural regions.
There should be a popular initiative aims to make increases in television and radio fees (CHF 200 per household, exemption for businesses).

The army's target number of soldiers should have a decrease to at least 120,000.

The Federal Council should be forbidden to give authorization to other states to re-export Swiss weapons in cases of a war of aggression in violation of international law (e.g., the attack on Ukraine).
Switzerland should effect the keeping of the Schengen agreement with the EU and effect the non-reintroduction of more security checks directly at the border.
Companies should give no consideration to whether their subsidiaries and suppliers operating abroad comply with social and environmental standards.
Switzerland should effect the maintenance of the Bilateral Agreements with the EU for free movement of persons.
Switzerland should effect the maintenance of a laxer interpretation of neutrality (renounce economic sanctions to a large extent).
